text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I managed to achieve such great results by
working consistently and putting everything I had
into it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is all because we both worked so hard,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, my opponents delivered a magnificent
performances as well. If I'd taken even one wrong
step, the outcome might have been entirely
different.
choice_data_list: It's fine to just be happy about your win!
Let's start training for your next race right away!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it is as you say. Maybe it's the lingering thrill
of the race that's making me a little impatient.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
First, let me take a moment to enjoy this victory
that we achieved together.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Then, we can set our sights on the next race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'd like to reflect on today's race and ensure I
have a firm grasp of what occured.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I cannot wait for the next race. However
tough my next opponents may be, I'll be sure to
achieve victory.
